name: Solana Trading Agent
description: Create a Solana token paper or signal agent with user-confirmed swap intent design.
degenPitch: Solana signal flow for token scanners and wallet watchers, client-side signing only.
whatItDoes: Watches Solana token lists, wallets, liquidity, and risk signals.
Generates paper trades or signal-only swap intents.
Uses DNA x402 receipts to monetize premium scanner output.
cursorPrompt: Create a Solana token signal agent using DNA x402. It should scan token risk, return paid premium alerts after receipt verification, require client-side signing for any live action, and never implement backend custody or backend signing.
suggestedPrompt: Create a Solana token signal agent using DNA x402. It should scan token risk, return paid premium alerts after receipt verification, require client-side signing for any live action, and never implement backend custody or backend signing.
receiptProofBehavior: Request quote for premium scanner output.
Commit quote and show fee waterfall.
Verify receipt before returning token signal details.
Attach receipt ID to the unlocked response.
